{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221956062A438AAA7CFB49CB751A"}"},"total":6859},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7258581175513203510","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看，主角的性格挺合我胃口，反正看着挺舒服的，不过51章怎么看也太少了吧？作者从今天开始爆更怎么样？对了，看我的名称也不是什么正经人，顺带问一下有没有骨科？[奸笑][奸笑][奸笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1690020226,"group_id":"7238203009606356024","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一个喜欢美好事物的人","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8KD432wrE3n8e6Udd3ncug=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f370f1ecc4fd49499e73d4e4e3e1f31e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705076&x-signature=faFfiJgor2yJdbHyKS75CH3vNfs%3D","user_id":"101122774262","user_name":"萝道至尊"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"101122774262","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7238203009606356024","book_info":{"abstract":"日系轻小说向+不无敌+日常+救赎＋微灵异+道术+炼金术
星野源穿越了，有妹有房，父母双忙。
忙碌的父母贼有钱，唯一的妹妹甚至是个超人气偶像，毫无疑问，星野源成了一个人生赢家。
但那——
夕阳下的破败道馆里，持剑守望数百年的剑客……
温馨治愈的游戏中，那件被鲜血染红的洛丽塔……
废弃的老校区里，被杂草掩埋的过往……
空无一人的舞台上，莫名诡异的歌声……
总要有人去一探究竟。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/4103d44a6d28739b13b9114702544f96","author":"洛然123","author_id":"","book_id":"7238203009606356024","book_name":"日轻：东京除灵日常","book_short_name":"日轻：源物语","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282030","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":516,"name":"都市异能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=516&name=都市异能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":858,"name":"轻小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=858&name=轻小说&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7238203362880160267","read_count":"92968","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1730704"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.5","serial_count":"812","tags":"都市高武,都市,穿越,多女主,都市异能,轻小说","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/183144174b059c7609917735b90257c8~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779364566&x-signature=CBIMVDeZAId39kEuWPZUdgqg7Jc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2576864945373527","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"8.156337e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221956062A438AAA7CFB49CB751A"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":66,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":8156,"reply_count":5,"show_pv":170217},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_reply_time":1693649695,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7339145582365950745","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"花了两天看完了，即便是阅过无数日本轻小说的我也觉得这本真的很不错，这要搁日本那儿，我想已经把动漫化提上日程了。确实很好看，角色人设贯穿始终，没有突然就性格大变或者突然发病，文笔也非常好，几乎没有多余的、毫无意义的描写，该退场的角色也退场地十分干净利落，完全没有毒点，就看着感觉非常有意思。就是目前还不太能看懂剧情走向，感觉作者似乎好像没怎么挖坑，不过仍旧是瑕不掩瑜。希望作者能继续写下去。最好更快点[吃瓜][吃瓜]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1708854604,"group_id":"7238203009606356024","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"淦！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N44771yC8u6LpAKQ64Ace0blhLuxv/mvEAKeO4RvH2G0","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/92066b28686c4163bd717f9ab0c992f7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776707741&x-signature=3BObWiVYQzxPeSZ5QHYRXrBrWmk%3D","user_id":"3593621753051197","user_name":"心海降临我身边"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3593621753051197","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1775627921,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,
